ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Oct-05-2020 Continued To Nov-09-20 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Apr-08-2019 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Danielle Miller appeared by telephone for Samantha Fox (Petitioner/Executor).

The Court stated that the declaration regarding the lost will is not in proper form, that it is hearsay based on what someone else saw and that they need a declaration from the Petitioner saying what she saw. Ms. Miller stated that she filed a supplement on March 22nd, that the Petitioner saw the Decedent's original will after the Decedent's death, that the Petitioner assisted the Decedent with his finances and that the supplement was verified by the Petitioner. Ms. Miller also stated that Mr. Diamond is a beneficiary of the pre-deceased Spouse's estate (PES-14-297962), that they just got valuations from the Probate Referee (Amy Harrington) for that estate and asked to have the same Probate Referee appointed in this estate. The issue of appointment of the Probate Referee is under submission. The Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary (subject to review of the order). Bond in the amount of $411,000.00 is required. Status on close of estate is set for October 5, 2020 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Chan. Not reported.
